name: Путь Гневных Мертвецов
description: Barbarians who walk the Path of the Wrathful Dead commune with the spirits of the deceased and channel their spectral powers. These Barbarians are often preoccupied with the dead whispering in their ears, which urge them to act upon the whims and emotions of the haunting spirits. Some who walk this path learn to master the powers gifted to them; others find they've become servants to the unending chorus clamoring for their attention.
shortDescription: Channel the Rage of the Unquiet Dead

features.name: Rage of the Dead
features.description: Your Rage taps into the endless fury of the unquiet dead. While your Rage is active, you take on aspects of restless spirits and you gain the following benefits.

details.shadowForm: You ignore {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB}. In addition, you can move through the space of any creature, but you can't end your move in an occupied space.
details.shadowySidestep: Your {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} increases by 10 feet, and {@variantrule Opportunity Attacks|XPHB} have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} against you.
details.spectralSight: You see creatures and objects within 120 feet that have the {@condition Invisible|XPHB} condition as if they were visible, and you can see into the Ethereal Plane.

features.name: Final Night Catharsis
features.description: You are overcome by an emotion a nearby spirit experienced at its death. You gain one of the following options of your choice. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can change your choice.

details.hate: When you miss with an attack roll against a creature, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the next attack roll you make against it before the end of your next turn.
details.jealousy: When a creature you have {@condition Grappled|XPHB} is about to make an ability check to end the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition on itself, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to impose {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on that roll.
details.terror: While you are {@variantrule Bloodied|XPHB}, you can take a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} to take the {@action Dash|XPHB} or {@action Disengage|XPHB} action.
